name: Shrimp & Vegetable Pasta (Gtkg62a)
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Large shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. At least 2 hours ahead, bring a large pot of water to a boil.
2. Carefully drop the shrimp into the boiling water and cook until just tender, about 1 minute.
3. Drain the shrimp, rinse under cold water, and drain again. Place in a large serving bowl.
4. Add the diced peppers, tomatoes, dill, tarragon, shallots, red pepper flakes, black pepper, salt, lemon juice, 3 tablespoons olive oil, and hot chile oil to the bowl with the shrimp. Toss well.
5. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
6. When ready to serve, bring a large pan of water to a boil. Drop in the broccoli and cook for 1 minute. Drain and rinse under cold water, then drain again.
7. Add the cooked peas and broccoli to the bowl with the shrimp and vegetables.
8. Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add the remaining 3 tablespoons olive oil and linguine. Cook at a rolling boil until just tender.
9. Drain the linguine and immediately toss with the shrimp and vegetable sauce.
10. Serve hot.
